Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark A. Swanson, Esq. of PAUL, HANLEY & HARLEY 510/559-9980, X150, for Paul, Hanley and Harley, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Jean Buchmann

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, PAUL, HANLEY & HARLEY, LLC's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for plaintiff Jean Buchmann is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
